iterations.theme: The Impact of Ethical Subscription Design: A Blinkist Case Study
iterations.reason_for_cut: This is the only iteration as the entire podcast is 42 minutes and 16 seconds, fitting within the 35-45 minute block requirement and covering a single overarching topic.

chapters.topic: Understanding Blinkist and the Free Trial Problem
Balancing Business Goals with User Empathy
Product Discovery: From Workshop to Trial Reminder Modal
Developing the Ethical Timeline Design and Its Impact
The Power of Transparency and Trust in User Experience
Long-term Revenue, Retention, and Unsubscribe Transparency
The Viral Blog Post and Apple's Adoption of the Design
JC Day's Current Role at GitHub and Future Aspirations
Concluding Remarks and Importance of Ethical Design
